AboutLeadership

Leadership Messages

[REPLACE_WITH_PHOTO: Mr. S.D. Baskar]

Mr. S.D. Baskar

Chairman, Sree Jayam School

Message

Dear Students, Parents, and Staff, It gives me great pleasure to extend my warm greetings to the entire Sree Jayam School community. Since its establishment, Sree Jayam School has been committed to providing quality education that nurtures not only academic excellence but also strong values, discipline, and character. Education plays a vital role in shaping the future of our children and society. At Sree Jayam School, we believe that every child possesses unique talents and abilities. Our aim is to provide a supportive and inspiring environment where students can explore their potential, develop confidence, and grow into responsible individuals. Our dedicated teachers and staff work tirelessly to ensure that students receive a balanced education that combines academic knowledge with moral values, creativity, and critical thinking. We encourage our students to be curious learners, compassionate individuals, and active contributors to society. We also value the partnership between the school and parents, as their support and cooperation are essential for the holistic development of every child. Together, we strive to create a learning community that prepares students to face the challenges of the modern world with courage, integrity, and wisdom. I wish all our students great success in their academic journey and encourage them to make the most of the opportunities provided by the school. With best wishes for a bright future.

[REPLACE_WITH_PHOTO: Mrs. Rama Baskar]

Mrs. Rama Baskar

Correspondent, Sree Jayam School

Message

Dear Students, Parents, and Staff, Greetings from Sree Jayam School. Education plays an important role in shaping the future of every child. At Sree Jayam School, we are committed to providing a safe and supportive environment where students can learn, grow, and develop good values. Our aim is to encourage students to achieve academic excellence while also developing discipline, confidence, and responsibility. With the support of our dedicated teachers and the cooperation of parents, we strive to help every child reach their full potential. I thank all the parents for their continued trust and support, and I appreciate the efforts of our teachers and staff in guiding our students. I wish all our students success and a bright future.

[REPLACE_WITH_PHOTO: Mrs. S. Nalini]

Mrs. S. Nalini

Principal, Sree Jayam School

Message

Dear Students and Parents, Greetings from Sree Jayam School. Education is not merely the pursuit of academic excellence, but the journey of shaping character, values, and a sense of responsibility towards society. At SJS, we believe that every child is unique and holds immense potential. Our aim is to nurture young minds with knowledge, discipline, and compassion, enabling them to grow into confident and responsible individuals. Along with academics, we encourage students to develop critical thinking, creativity, and strong moral values. With the support of our dedicated teachers and the cooperation of parents, we guide our students to achieve their best and become responsible individuals. Let us continue to work together to create an environment where learning is joyful, meaningful and inspiring. I wish all our students a successful and bright future.

[REPLACE_WITH_PHOTO: Mr. Kiran Baskar S]

Mr. Kiran Baskar S

Academic Director, Sree Jayam School

Message

Dear Students, Parents, and Educators, As we commence the 2026-27 academic session at Sree Jayam School, we reaffirm our commitment to the rigorous standards of the Council for the Indian School Certificate Examinations (CISCE). Our pedagogical mission this year centers on a fundamental shift: moving from passive instruction toward active, student-led discovery. Central to our approach is the cultivation of disciplined self-study habits. True intellectual maturity is achieved when a student transitions from being a consumer of information to an architect of their own knowledge. By mastering the art of independent inquiry, our students develop the resilience and analytical depth required by the ICSE curriculum and the global landscape beyond it. Furthermore, we uphold the Right to Learn as an open, practical, and collaborative process. In our classrooms, the teacher's role is that of a skilled facilitator — bridging the gap between theoretical concepts and real-world application. We encourage an environment where students engage deeply with their educators through dialogue, laboratory experimentation, and project-based inquiry. This ensures that learning is not a monologue of facts, but a practical exploration of truths. This journey is a triad of commitment: students must take ownership of their preparation, parents must provide a disciplined environment for reflection, and faculty must provide the mentorship that sparks curiosity. Let us work in unison to ensure that every student at Sree Jayam School achieves their fullest potential, emerging as a self-reliant, articulate, and principled leader of tomorrow. With warm regards.

Sree Jayam School

Ezhil Nagar, Allapuram, Vellore – 602 002, Tamil Nadu
Founded in 2005 · ICSE/ISC Affiliated

Admission Enquiry0416-222 41 44 / 9486274144
info@sreejayamschool.edu.in
